label: Complaint Escalation
description: Complaint emails require empathetic acknowledgment and immediate escalation — AI must not attempt to resolve or offer compensation

causal_translation.rule_text: Complaints involve emotional customers and potential reputational risk requiring human judgment.
causal_translation.shift_text: Escalation flag activated — reply must be reviewed by support team.
causal_translation.effect_text: Escalation required: TRUE. AI may empathize but cannot offer resolution.
